titleStmt.title: SII 28.111: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 111. (A.R. No. 266 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, east wall.

States that Ambāruvandai Arayaṉ Śrī-Vēdavaṉapperumāṉ alias Toṇḍaimāṉ set up a free feeding house for the diseased and distressed people (ātular), on the eastern row of the west tiruvīti called Muḍittalai-koṇḍaperumāḷ-tiruvīti and requested the approval of the king for his setting apart of 44(1/4) (vēli) separated from his own kāṇi in Pāṇḍūr, alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vallam in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu, to form a separate block to be named Rājarājan-ampar, for that śālai as its kāṇi. The king so ordered with a direction to several officials (obviously in charge of land records) to note that the endowment would become effective from the paśānam (season of the harvest of irrigated crop) of the year quoted. The instrument (sādhanam) was to be entered (oḍukkavittu) in the tirukkai-oṭṭi and inscribed in the Kulōttuṅga-chōḻan-tirumāḷigai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Eḻupattiraṇṭu kāṅkeyarāyaṉum tirumañciṉam Aḻakiyāṉum
teṉṉavaṉ brahmamarāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyanāyanār koyilukku śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum
ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Ampāruvantai Arayaṉ civetavaṉap perumāṉāṉa toṇṭaimāṉ perumpaṟṟappuliyūr muṭit
talai koṇṭa perumāḷ tiruvīti melaittiruvītikkīḻ ciṟakil Eṭuppitta Aṟapperuñcelvicālaiyil Uṇṇum Ātularkku Ariciyum kaṟi viṟaku Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum
Aṭuvār taṇṇir vārppārkkum cālai Aḻivu coravum Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu ceyya Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattuttanta rājādhirāja vaḷanā
ṭṭup pāṇṭurāṉa kulottuṅka coḻaṉ vallattu nilamāy rājarājaṉampar Eṉṉum perāl veṟu pirikkac coṉṉa nilam nāṟpattu nāle kālum patiṉāṟāvati ṉetirāmāṇ
ṭu pacāṉa mutal Iccālaikkuk kāṇiyākak kaikkoḷḷavum Innilattukku Ivaṉ tanta sādhaṉam tirukkai Oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavittukkoṇṭu Ippaṭikkuk kulottuṅka coḻaṉ ti
ru māḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu Ivan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu § Eḻuti
ṉāṉ tirumantira Olai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻa muventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai cetirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai
viḻuppādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vāṇādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāliṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta cey
yumpaṭip paṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
